description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Examples that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on ubuntu-18.04, windows-latest, and macos-latest with Python 3.7. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up Python, install dependencies with pip and tox, and then run tox -e testexamples with environment variables and conditions specific to Linux, macOS, or Windows. Send a Slack notification on failure using a custom action.
